prompt: Replace background with lines of crashing CUDA logs, and overlay top text ‘Not sure if GPU busy’ and bottom text ‘or driver issues’.

Ensure the new text is overlaid in a white font with a black outline, positioned similarly to the original text at the top and bottom of the image, maintaining the character's central and clear visibility.
objects: Dense, chaotic lines of crashing CUDA logs background
Text "Not sure if GPU busy" in white font with black outline at the top
Text "or driver issues" in white font with black outline at the bottom
